query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.phone, p.isActive, p.createdAt, 
       GROUP_CONCAT(c.name) as cities
FROM partners p
LEFT JOIN partner_cities pc ON p.id = pc.partnerId AND pc.contractStatus = 'active'
LEFT JOIN cities c ON pc.cityId = c.id
WHERE p.name IN ('孙志俊', '朱利闻', '韩颖杰', '周建虎', '赵浩然', '康培源', '李一涵')
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.phone, p.isActive, p.createdAt
ORDER BY p.id;
